zh-CN.name: 土豆泥
zh-CN.intro: 土豆泥是软软的、香香的，像云朵一样蓬松。它是由土豆做成的，吃起来滑滑的，是很多人都喜欢的美食哦。

story.title: 🥔云朵土豆泥
story.body: 星期天，妈妈在厨房里忙碌着。小美跑过去问：“妈妈，今天吃什么呀？”妈妈神秘地说：“我要做一朵能吃的云朵。”小美好奇极了。妈妈拿出几个圆圆的土豆，洗干净、削去皮，然后切成小块放进锅里。煮了一会儿，土豆变得软软的。妈妈把土豆捞出来，用勺子轻轻压呀压，又加了牛奶和一点点黄油。哇！土豆真的变成了像云朵一样又白又软的泥。小美尝了一口，眼睛都亮了：“真的像云朵，软软的、香香的！”妈妈说：“这就是土豆泥，吃下去会让人暖暖的、很开心。”那天晚上，小美吃了满满一碗，连碗边都刮得干干净净。

knowledge.title: 土豆泥是怎么做的？
knowledge.body: 把土豆煮熟以后，去掉皮，用勺子压得碎碎的，再加一点牛奶和黄油搅拌均匀，就变成又香又软的土豆泥啦。

en.name: Mashed Potatoes
en.intro: Mashed potatoes are soft, fluffy, and smell wonderful, just like little clouds. They're made from potatoes and taste so smooth — a favorite food for many!

story.title: 🥔Cloud Mashed Potatoes
story.body: On Sunday, Mom was busy in the kitchen. Xiao Mei ran over and asked, 'Mommy, what are we having today?' Mom smiled mysteriously and said, 'I'm going to make a cloud you can eat.' Xiao Mei was so curious. Mom took out a few round potatoes, washed them, peeled them, and cut them into small pieces. She put them in a pot and boiled them until soft. Then she scooped them out and gently mashed them with a spoon, adding a little milk and butter. Wow! The potatoes turned into something as white and soft as a cloud. Xiao Mei took a taste, and her eyes lit up. 'It really is like a cloud, so soft and yummy!' Mom said, 'These are mashed potatoes. Eating them makes you feel warm and happy.' That evening, Xiao Mei ate a big bowl and even scraped it clean!

knowledge.title: How to make mashed potatoes?
knowledge.body: Boil the potatoes until tender, peel off the skins, mash them well with a spoon, and mix in a little milk and butter. Then you get fluffy and delicious mashed potatoes!
